ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the scheme */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the scheme was launched */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of scheme (e.g., growth option, regular plan) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the scheme (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  "investment_minimum" REAL /* Minimum amount required to invest in the scheme */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Annual fee charged by the fund */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the scheme (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment strategy */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scheme details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheme the returns belong to */,
  "return_1_week" REAL /* Return percentage over 1 week */,
  "return_1_month" REAL /* Return percentage over 1 month */,
  "return_3_months" REAL /* Return percentage over 3 months */,
  "return_6_months" REAL /* Return percentage over 6 months */,
  "return_1_year" REAL /* Return percentage over 1 year */,
  "return_2_years" REAL /* Return percentage over 2 years */,
  "return_3_years" REAL /* Return percentage over 3 years */,
  "return_5_years" REAL /* Return percentage over 5 years */,
  "return_10_years" REAL /* Return percentage over 10 years */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the returns data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_returns_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheme the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., prospectus, annual report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_documents_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, investment manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
